programs.title: Tempting Fate
programs.desc: (M) Gabby, a mother of two, longs for another child but her world shatters when she discovers her husband Elliot had a vasectomy without consulting her.

programs.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programs.desc: (M) A man agrees to take a job as the "live-in" manservant to a wealthy businesswoman. He then realizes he has made a deal with the devil.
